title: Teddy Pendergrass: If You Don't Know Me
original_title: Teddy Pendergrass: If You Don't Know Me
overview: The untold and ultimately inspiring story of legendary singer, Teddy Pendergrass, the man poised to be the biggest R&B artist of all time until the tragic accident that changed his life forever at the age of only 31.
